label: Inbox · approval queue
purpose: Let the user review pending agent permission requests and decide whether work can continue.
primaryActions: Open more detail about the requested command or file change.
Edit the requested command or input before running it.
Create a scoped allow rule when the request should not ask again.
coverageNotes: Swift root exists and is populated; board is newer target composition.

label: Decision sheet · all 4 actions
purpose: Present the full decision surface for one approval request.
primaryActions: Edit and run a modified request.
coverageNotes: Decision mechanics exist; this audit did not capture a stable isolated sheet route.

label: Critical · Face ID gate
purpose: Require local authentication before approving an irreversible or broad-impact request.
primaryActions: Cancel and return to the approval.
Review why the request is critical.
coverageNotes: Biometric gate exists and simulator degrades gracefully; no captured Face ID prompt surface.

label: Decision · edit & run (3rd action)
purpose: Allow the user to safely modify an agent request before execution.
coverageNotes: Action is represented in the approval card; target board shows a dedicated edit sheet.

label: Decision · allow always → rule written
purpose: Confirm that an approval has been converted into a reusable scoped policy rule.
primaryActions: Undo or revoke the rule if needed.
coverageNotes: Scope sheet exists, but no stable automated screenshot was captured.

label: Inbox · first-run + demo
purpose: Explain the first useful approval loop and give the user a safe demo path.
primaryActions: Start the first run or demo.
Skip to the inbox if setup is already complete.
coverageNotes: Swift onboarding exists; board combines first run and demo approval in inbox.

label: Inbox zero · returning user
purpose: Show that there are no pending decisions while still communicating system readiness.
primaryActions: Open fleet or activity for context.
Reconnect if the bridge is offline.
coverageNotes: State gallery covers empty/loading/error patterns; no real-app empty inbox capture in this pass.

label: Fleet · cross-vendor spend
purpose: Show connected hosts, agents, provider usage, and operational status across the user’s control plane.
primaryActions: Open a host or running agent.
Open quota guard or host health details.
coverageNotes: Fleet root exists; board adds denser spend/privacy treatment.

label: Agent · run detail + stop (NEW)
purpose: Show the details and controls for an active or recent agent run.
primaryActions: Open logs, proof, or changed files.
Send a follow-up instruction when supported.
coverageNotes: Swift RunDetailView exists but has no direct gallery route captured.

label: Activity · while you were away
purpose: Summarize important decisions, runs, and bridge events that happened while the user was away.
primaryActions: Filter by host, agent, or risk.
Export or inspect audit evidence when available.
coverageNotes: Activity tab exists; populated audit data depends on daemon/live state.

label: Proof Card · completion attestation
purpose: Summarize what an agent completed and provide evidence that the result can be trusted.
primaryActions: Open changed files or CI results.
coverageNotes: Dedicated gallery route captured.

label: Loop · goal → plan → CI → proof
purpose: Show the full lifecycle of an agent loop from goal through plan, execution, CI, and proof.
primaryActions: Stop or redirect the loop when supported.
coverageNotes: Swift view exists with CI/proof sections; no direct screenshot route captured.

label: Worktrees · 3-column branch supervision
purpose: Compare multiple active worktrees or branches and help the user decide what should continue, merge, or stop.
coverageNotes: Swift view exists; no direct screenshot route captured.

label: Nudge · mid-run instruction
purpose: Send a mid-run instruction to an agent without restarting the task.
primaryActions: Choose whether the instruction is advisory or blocking.
coverageNotes: No Swift route/view found for the board nudge composer.

label: Switch model · mid-run
purpose: Change the model or provider used by an active run when cost, quota, privacy, or capability needs change.
coverageNotes: No Swift route/view found for mid-run model switching.

label: CI / PR Event Feed
purpose: Show repository checks, pull request events, and CI status related to agent work.
primaryActions: Filter by run, branch, or status.
Retry or inspect failed checks when supported.
coverageNotes: Backend/client support exists inside loop detail, but no standalone feed route was captured.

label: Budget · set-run-budget overlay
purpose: Set or adjust the spend limit for one run before or during execution.
primaryActions: Confirm or cancel the budget change.
coverageNotes: Budget sheet exists behind RunDetailView; no stable sheet screenshot route captured.

label: Run detail · control surface (v2)
purpose: Provide a single control surface for monitoring, stopping, budgeting, and reviewing a run.
primaryActions: Open proof, files, CI, and activity.
Change budget or send a nudge when available.
coverageNotes: Swift RunDetailView exists; no direct screenshot route captured.

label: Dispatch · start a task (NEW)
purpose: Start a new agent task with the right host, repository, provider, budget, and policy context.
primaryActions: Set optional budget or caution level.
coverageNotes: Swift DispatchView exists and is reachable as a sheet, but was not captured by stable automation.

label: Policy · presets + effect chips
purpose: Let the user choose and understand policy presets that determine what agents can do without asking.
primaryActions: Inspect what each preset permits or blocks.
coverageNotes: Swift policy editor exists; no direct screenshot route captured.

label: Policy · edit policy.yaml + reload
purpose: Edit the bridge policy file and reload it on the host.
coverageNotes: Swift bridge policy editor/reload path exists; live bridge data not captured.

label: Settings · notifications + quiet hours
purpose: Configure which agent and approval events notify the user and when notifications should be quiet.
coverageNotes: Settings root captured; detailed notification controls are below/inside settings.

label: Settings · provider keys (multi-vendor)
purpose: Manage provider credentials and model access without exposing secrets unnecessarily.
coverageNotes: Swift provider keys view exists; no pushed view screenshot captured.

label: Settings · Library dissolved
purpose: Collect account, security, policy, notifications, billing, provider, relay, and advanced configuration entry points.
coverageNotes: Settings root exists and Library is not a root tab; target board is denser.

label: Policy Simulator · past N days
purpose: Estimate how a policy would have affected recent agent activity before applying it.
coverageNotes: Swift simulator view exists from policy editor; no screenshot route captured.

label: Secrets · vault + pending requests
purpose: Show available secret metadata and pending agent requests for secret access.
primaryActions: Approve or deny a secret request.
Revoke or rotate access where supported.
coverageNotes: Swift secrets view exists; live secret data is owner-only/live-data.

label: Onboarding 1 · hero
purpose: Introduce the product’s primary job and start the setup flow.
primaryActions: Learn what needs to be connected.
states: Returning user who has not completed setup
coverageNotes: Swift onboarding exists but visual direction differs from the board.

label: Onboarding 2 · pair the bridge (no SSH)
purpose: Pair the phone with the bridge or local control plane without requiring the user to understand SSH first.
primaryActions: Scan or enter a pairing code.
coverageNotes: Alternate onboarding gallery captured; exact board step not isolated.

label: Onboarding 3 · choose caution
purpose: Choose the initial caution/autonomy level for agent approvals.
primaryActions: Review what the level means functionally.
coverageNotes: Caution/autonomy exists in onboarding/settings; exact board step not isolated.

label: Onboarding 4 · first run + demo
purpose: Guide the user into the first run or demo after basic setup is complete.
coverageNotes: First-run demo treatment is board-only as a composed artboard.

label: Advanced · add host over SSH
purpose: Connect a new host that agents can use for work.
coverageNotes: Swift AddHostView exists; sheet capture was not stable in this pass.

label: Advanced · trust host key (TOFU)
purpose: Ask the user to trust or reject a host key the first time a host is connected.
coverageNotes: Requires live SSH host-key flow; not faked in screenshots.

label: Advanced · SSH keys (kept · real data)
purpose: Show SSH key material status and keychain-backed access without exposing private key contents.
coverageNotes: Keychain/real-key state exists but was not captured with private data.

label: Power-user · live block session
purpose: Provide deeper access to a live session transcript and command blocks for users who need to inspect execution.
primaryActions: Switch between block and raw session modes when supported.
coverageNotes: Session gallery captured; live terminal data is owner-only/live-data.

label: Diff · approve a write
purpose: Let the user inspect a proposed file change before approving an agent write.
coverageNotes: Dedicated diff gallery route captured.

label: File viewer · tap a file → drawer (NEW)
purpose: Preview a file or selected changed file from an agent run.
primaryActions: Return to run or diff context.
coverageNotes: File preview gallery captured; board drawer interaction is newer target design.

label: Relay pairing · E2E status
purpose: Pair and monitor the encrypted relay path used for approvals and status updates.
coverageNotes: Swift relay pairing view exists; no pushed view screenshot captured.

label: Doctor · health check
purpose: Run health checks that explain why setup, bridge, relay, notifications, or provider access is not working.
primaryActions: Open fix instructions for failed checks.
coverageNotes: Swift doctor view exists; no pushed view screenshot captured.

label: Allow always · scope config
purpose: Define the exact scope of a reusable allow rule before it is saved.
coverageNotes: Swift scope sheet exists; no stable isolated screenshot route captured.

label: Trust & Privacy · what leaves your host
purpose: Explain what data leaves the host and what remains local for each product capability.
primaryActions: Open related settings for relay, providers, or keys.
coverageNotes: Settings entry exists; detailed trust screen was not captured.

label: Fleet · model + privacy
purpose: Show model, provider, and privacy state per host or active agent.
primaryActions: Switch to a safer provider when supported.
coverageNotes: Fleet has model/privacy badges; board detail is newer target design.

label: Audit · tamper-evident chain
purpose: Show tamper-evident audit records and verification status for decisions and bridge events.
coverageNotes: Audit chain view and verification model exist; no pushed view screenshot captured.

label: Host health · daemon detail
purpose: Show detailed daemon and host health for one connected machine.
coverageNotes: Swift has host health polling/badge; no daemon-detail screen found.

label: Billing · spend + quota remaining
purpose: Show spend, quota, usage, and billing state across providers or the app account.
coverageNotes: Dedicated billing gallery route captured.

label: Lancer Pro · paywall
purpose: Explain why a paid capability is unavailable and let the user upgrade or compare plans.
coverageNotes: Dedicated paywall gallery route captured.

label: Quota · per-provider dashboard
purpose: Show per-provider quota and spend guardrails so users can prevent unexpected cost or blocked runs.
primaryActions: Adjust alerts or limits where supported.
coverageNotes: Swift QuotaGuardView exists; no direct screenshot route captured.

label: Library hub → dissolved
purpose: Document that Library should not be a primary app destination and its useful pieces should move into more relevant flows.
primaryActions: Use this as a design constraint, not a user-facing screen.
coverageNotes: Swift root IA has no Library tab; library responsibilities are dissolved.

label: Session surface switcher → deleted
purpose: Document that a session surface switcher should not be a primary navigation model.
primaryActions: Use this as a design constraint, not a user-facing screen.
coverageNotes: No root session surface switcher is present in captured root tabs.

label: Mock SSH host counts → fixed (real data)
purpose: Document that host and key counts should reflect real data rather than placeholder counts.
primaryActions: Use real counts wherever this information appears.
coverageNotes: Fleet uses real/debug-seeded host data; exact board note is not a product screen.

label: Decisions applied
purpose: Summarize product decisions that should guide the remaining page designs.
coverageNotes: Board decision card is not meant to become a Swift screen.

label: Risk ramp · independent of brand
purpose: Define how risk levels should map to approval behavior independent of provider branding.
primaryActions: Use risk mapping when designing approval, policy, and notification flows.
coverageNotes: Risk logic and UI states exist; board card is a product/design rationale artifact.

label: SessionView · full-screen block terminal
purpose: Provide a full-screen block terminal session showing agent work, live command blocks with status, output streaming, and a chat input bar.
primaryActions: Read live output from running commands.
coverageNotes: Session gallery route exists; board adds richer block card treatment and persistent chat input.

label: ChatTranscriptView · scrollable block transcript

primaryActions: Tap a block to expand or inspect.

label: ChatInputBar · bottom input bar
